rulings.Case Title: IN RE: J. BOB BROWN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petiton Of Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: Continued to March 25, 2014. No response to Examiner's notes faxed to Counsel on February 7, 2014 at 1:30 p.m. Please note, in addition to the notes sent, Counsel must provide a new proposed order that includes a date and signature line on the last page. It is this court's policy to continue a matter for two weeks and then for one month for failure to respond to the notes. If no response is provided 3 court days prior to the continued hearing date (no later than Thursday, March 20, 2014), the petition may be taken off calendar if it is not a mandatory petition.
